plot outline: Jack Skellington, the pumpkin king of Halloween Town, is bored with doing the same thing every year for Halloween. One day he stumbles into Christmas Town, and is so taken with the idea of Christmas that he tries to get the resident bats, ghouls, and goblins of Halloween Town to help him put on Christmas instead of Halloween -- but alas, they can't get it quite right.
title: The Nightmare Before Christmas
akas: The Nightmare Before Christmas in Disney Digital 3-D (United States)
Tim Burton and Henry Selick's the Nightmare Before Christmas (United States)
